response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and a genuine developer-tooling streak (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/dev-ops setup, MCP code generators), but the role is a Level II people-management position requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership. The resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, running performance cycles, or owning team roadmaps, and mobile experience is limited to a single app-maintenance stint a decade ago.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software development experience, well beyond the 8-year minimum
Authentic developer-tools background: test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infrastructure, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
Teaching and community leadership (workshops, courses, code katas) suggesting mentoring aptitude
concerns: No formal people-management experience — all roles are individual contributor positions
No demonstrated experience setting team priorities, roadmaps, or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform exposure is thin and dated (one iOS/Apple TV role in 2015-2016)

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
